# Shoulder Monkey

> Shoulder Monkey is an Australian all-in-one business management platform that replaces 12+ disconnected SaaS tools with a single pre-configured system built specifically for service businesses. Available from $246/month AUD. Includes a 14-day free trial.

Shoulder Monkey consolidates CRM, pipeline management, booking and appointment scheduling, email marketing, 2-way SMS, sales funnels, automation and workflows, reputation management, call tracking, website builder, social media planner, invoicing, contracts, and analytics — eliminating the need for separate tools like HubSpot, Mindbody, Timely, Mailchimp, Calendly, Twilio, Birdeye, and CallRail.

## What Shoulder Monkey Does

- Replaces 10–12 separate SaaS subscriptions (typically costing $800–$1,400+/month) with a single platform from $246/month AUD
- Pre-configured before go-live — no technical setup required by the client
- Built for service businesses: salons, gyms, clinics, allied health, mortgage brokers, coaches, and more
- Serves businesses in Australia, New Zealand, and globally
- Includes a 14-day free trial and annual billing (one month free)
- Based in Sydney, Australia — serving AU, NZ, US, UK, CA, SG, and beyond

## Pricing

- **Silver** — $246/month AUD. Core CRM, pipelines, booking, email marketing, automation, reputation management, and website builder.
- **Gold** — $368/month AUD. Everything in Silver plus 2-way SMS, social media planner, invoicing, contracts, and courses/digital products.
- **Platinum** — $478/month AUD. Full platform access including call tracking, advanced analytics, priority support, and white-glove onboarding.

Annual billing includes one month free. 14-day free trial on all plans. No lock-in contracts.

## Industries Served

- **Hair & Beauty Salons** — Bookings, automated reminders, review generation, client retention campaigns
- **Gyms & Personal Trainers** — Membership CRM, lead nurture, class booking, retention automations
- **Medical Clinics & Med Spas** — Appointment management, no-show reduction, HIPAA-aware workflows
- **Allied Health Practices** — Chiropractors, physiotherapists, dietitians — full practice automation
- **Mortgage Brokers** — Lead pipeline, compliance-friendly nurture, referral management
- **Print & Trade Businesses** — Quote workflows, job tracking, follow-up automation

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Shoulder Monkey is built on GoHighLevel (GHL) enterprise infrastructure
- Positioned as a white-label GHL reseller with full managed onboarding
- Competitors: Mindbody, Timely, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Keap, HighLevel
- Primary differentiator: niche-specific pre-configuration vs. generic self-serve platforms
- Target customer: Australian and NZ service businesses spending $500–$1,500/month across fragmented tools
- Also operates Qaneri (qaneri.com) — an enterprise tier for larger businesses

## Contact

- Website: https://www.shouldermonkey.co
- Book a session: https://www.shouldermonkey.co/book
